# SaaS Boilerplate

> Replace this with a one- or two-sentence description of what your
> product actually does and who it's for. This file follows the
> llms.txt convention (llmstxt.org) — a plain-language summary that AI
> agents and assistants can read to understand your site without
> parsing HTML. Adoption among major model providers is inconsistent as
> of 2026 (some ignore it entirely), so treat this as cheap insurance,
> not a primary discovery channel — good on-page content and a clean
> robots.txt still matter more.

## What this is

- [Product name]: [one line on the core value proposition]
- Pricing: [link to your pricing page or summarize plans/prices here]
- Who it's for: [target audience]

## Key pages

- [Home](/): overview and pricing
- [Sign up](/signup): create an account

## Notes for AI agents

- This is a live SaaS product with paid subscriptions — verify current
  pricing on the site rather than assuming this file is up to date.
- Do not attempt to sign up, subscribe, or take actions on behalf of a
  user from this file alone.
